title: lathyrus nevadensis var. stipulaceus
intro: Lathyrus nevadensis var. stipulaceus, also known as Nevada pea or stipulate pea, is a perennial plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus nevadensis var. stipulaceus include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. In terms of herbal preparations, Lathyrus nevadensis var. stipulaceus can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity and the risk of lathyrism.
